ecopetAi.disclaimer: EcoPet AI does not replace veterinarians, animal scientists, trainers, specialists, or other qualified professionals. The information provided is for informational and decision-support purposes only.
ecopetAi.fullDisclaimer: EccoPet AI helps organize information and provide general recommendations, but it does not replace veterinary care.

ecopetAi.demoReply:
I'm in EccoPet AI demo mode. I can give general guidance on care, food, routine and organizing your pet's health, and suggest products and services. Create your account for personalized answers based on your pets.

EccoPet AI helps organize information and provide general recommendations, but it does not replace veterinary care.

validation.birthDateFuture: Date of birth cannot be in the future.

validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
validation.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordNoPhone: Password cannot contain your phone number.
validation.passwordNoBirthdate: Password cannot contain your date of birth.

validation.activityStartFuture: Activity start date cannot be in the future.

password.recommendationsTitle: Tips for a more secure password

requirements.length12: More than 12 characters for excellent password
requirements.noName: Does not contain first or last name
requirements.noBirthdate: Does not contain date of birth

tips.avoidName: Avoid using your first name, last name or nickname.
tips.avoidFamily: Avoid names of family members, pets or people close to you.
tips.avoidDates: Avoid birth dates, anniversaries or document numbers.
tips.avoidCommon: Avoid common words, numeric sequences or easy-to-guess combinations.
tips.avoidSocial: Avoid public information available on social networks.
tips.combine: Prefer combining letters, numbers and symbols.
tips.length: The longer the password, the better your account protection.

terms.acceptanceRequired: You must accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy to continue.
terms.legalHint: Read and accept the EcoPet Customer documents to complete your registration securely.
terms.previewSummary: Introductory summary. For the full text, open the official page.

client.terms: I accept the EcoPet Customer Terms of Use and Service
client.privacy: I accept the EcoPet Customer Privacy Policy
client.termsPreview: These terms govern use of EcoPet by pet owners and guardians, including purchases, services, bookings, telehealth, animal welfare and Customer responsibilities.
client.privacyPreview: This policy describes how EcoPet collects, uses, stores and protects your personal data, pets, orders and bookings, in compliance with applicable privacy laws.

partner.terms: I accept the EcoPet Partner Terms of Use and Partnership
partner.privacy: I accept the EcoPet Partner Privacy Policy
partner.legalHint: Read and accept the EcoPet Partner documents to complete your registration securely.
partner.legalSubheading: Legal documents exclusive to partners — separate from EcoPet Customer terms.
partner.termsPreview: These Terms govern EcoPet commercial partnership exclusively: registration, products, services, bookings, deliveries, pickup, animal transport, reputation, document verification, animal welfare and Partner responsibilities.
partner.privacyPreview: This Policy describes exclusively how EcoPet handles Partner data — CPF, CNPJ, contact, address, financial, documents, photos, logo, access and history — in compliance with applicable privacy laws.

ong.terms: I accept the EcoPet NGO Terms of Use and Collaboration
ong.privacy: I accept the EcoPet NGO Privacy Policy
ong.legalHint: Read and accept the EcoPet NGO documents to complete your registration securely.
ong.legalSubheading: Legal documents exclusive to NGOs and protectors — separate from EcoPet Customer terms.
ong.termsPreview: These Terms govern NGO and individual protector collaboration on EcoPet: rescue, responsible adoption, foster homes, campaigns, fundraising, adoption fairs, animal listings, ethical platform use, fraud and abuse prevention, plus registrant responsibilities and EcoPet limitations.
ong.privacyPreview: This Policy describes exclusively how EcoPet handles NGO and individual protector data — CPF, CNPJ, legal representative, contact, address, documents, proofs, photos, animal images, authentication, cookies and history — in compliance with applicable privacy laws.

free.q: Do I need to pay to use ECOPET?
free.a: No. The Free plan includes social feed, pet registration and basic AI. Premium plans expand features.

marketplace.q: Can I browse the marketplace without an account?
marketplace.a: Yes. Visitors can browse products and services publicly. Cart and favorites require login.

ai.a: No. ECOPET AI is assistive and informational. Always consult a professional for diagnoses.

accessibility.a: Yes. We offer VLibras, high contrast, font adjustment, screen reader and keyboard navigation.

landing.ctaSubtitle: Create your account and personalize your pet ecosystem. Public marketplace available for visitors.

assistant.title: EccoPet Assistant
assistant.subtitle: AI · always available
assistant.greeting: Hi! I'm the EccoPet Assistant. How can I help you and your pet today?
assistant.s1: What care does my pet need this season?
assistant.demoReply: I'm in demo mode. I can help you find products, services, partners and NGOs, and answer questions about pet care. Connect the full AI for personalized answers. AI tools do not replace veterinary care.

home.heroTitle: A new way to care, shop, adopt and connect in the pet universe.
home.heroSubtitle: Community, marketplace, services, adoption and artificial intelligence in a single ecosystem.
home.areasSubtitle: Five areas to explore even before creating your account.
home.howSubtitle: Three steps to transform your pet's routine.
home.how1Text: Sign up and add your first pet with a photo and preferences.
home.how2Text: Explore services, products and NGOs near you.
home.how3Text: Book, shop and track everything in one place.
home.marketSubtitle: Carefully curated products — like Chewy, with a Brazilian soul.
home.servicesSubtitle: Grooming, vet and much more — book with trusted partners.
home.communitySubtitle: Share moments, follow other pet parents and find inspiration.
home.communityText: A social feed with real stories, adoptions and tips — because pets have a social life too.
home.ngosSubtitle: Adoption stories, volunteering and donations that change lives.
home.aiSubtitle: Your smart assistant for routine, food and well-being — soon, with the same premium experience.
home.aiText: Veterinary questions, personalized recommendations and smart reminders — all designed for your bond with your pet.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: People who use it, recommend it.
home.t1Text: I found grooming near home and track everything in the app.
home.t2Text: We adopted Thor through the platform. It was a moving experience.
home.t3Text: A trustworthy marketplace and a community that truly helps.
home.finalTitle: Start today. Your pet deserves it.
home.finalSubtitle: Join thousands of pet parents who have already transformed how they care for their animals.
